title: Designing a Supplier Audit Programme
alt: Five stages of a risk-based supplier audit programme

items.label: Set scope & ownership
items.desc: Map the supplier universe; write policy, roles and decision rules

items.label: Tier suppliers by risk
items.desc: Score on criticality and history; assign critical, major or minor

items.label: Schedule & resource
items.desc: Rolling multi-year plan; frequency driven by each supplier's tier

items.label: Execute consistently
items.desc: Shared templates, GMP aide-memoire, fixed finding classification

items.label: Close loop & measure
items.desc: Verify CAPA closure; track metrics into ICH Q10 review
